name: Grade 5 Martial Arts — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 5 pathway for combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Martial Arts. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 5 knowledge and transferable skills in combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Martial Arts.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Martial Arts
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Martial Arts and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
